vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn (âm thanh, tiếng ồn) bên ngoài
vocab.example: I prefer quiet libraries because they allow me to shut out the world and focus entirely on my studies.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (không khí)
vocab.example: Whenever I visit the countryside, I love to just sit and soak up the tranquil atmosphere.
I find it nearly impossible to block out the constant honking of horns in this city.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn sau một thời gian căng thẳng
vocab.example: A peaceful park is the perfect place for me to wind down after a hectic day at the office.

vocab.meaning: trốn khỏi, thoát khỏi (nơi nào đó)
vocab.example: Sometimes I just need to get away from the hustle and bustle of the city center.

vocab.meaning: đi thẳng đến (một nơi nào đó)
vocab.example: If I'm feeling overwhelmed by noise, I usually head for the local botanical garden.

vocab.meaning: át đi (tiếng ồn khác lớn hơn)
vocab.example: The loud music in the cafe completely drowned out our conversation.

vocab.meaning: trở nên hăng hái, phấn chấn hơn
vocab.example: I actually perk up in lively, noisy environments because the energy of the crowd is infectious.
I’m not a fan of noisy clubs; I’d much rather chill out in a quiet lounge with a few friends.

vocab.meaning: tránh xa (cái gì đó không thích)
vocab.example: I tend to steer clear of busy shopping malls during the weekends because the noise levels are deafening.
